zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Claypool Goodale於1545年出生在英國藍卡爾曼徹斯特時，他的父親Thomas Robert Goodloe31歲，母親Lady Anna Elizabetha de Gerard24歲。他於1561年與Elizabeth Taylor在英國素福爾可丹寧頓結婚。他去世於1606年10月28日在英國藍卡爾曼徹斯特享年61歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾阿斯普爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Claypool Goodale于1545年出生在英国藍卡爾曼徹斯特时，他的父亲Thomas Robert Goodloe31岁，母亲Lady Anna Elizabetha de Gerard24岁。他于1561年与Elizabeth Taylor在英国素福爾可丹寧頓结婚。他去世于1606年10月28日在英国藍卡爾曼徹斯特享年61岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾阿斯普爾。

nameMeanings.name: Goodale
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Goodall  .

variants.name: Goodall
meanings: metonymic occupational name from Middle English god(e) ‘good’ + ale ‘ale’; perhaps denoting an innkeeper or tan ale taster. An ale taster was a manorial or borough court official appointed to regulate the quality of ale sold by inns and alewives, especially with the duty of preventing the sale of sour or watered-down ale.
alternatively, it may be a habitational name from Gowdall near Snaith, in Yorkshire. This place was named in Old English with golde ‘marigold’ + halh ‘nook, recess’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: Claypool
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Claypole in Lincolnshire, named from Old English clǣg ‘clay’ + pōl ‘pool’. This surname is now rare in Britain.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Claypool Goodale was born in 1545, in Manchester, Lancashire, England, his father, Thomas Robert Goodloe, was 31 and his mother, Lady Anna Elizabetha de Gerard, was 24. He married Elizabeth Taylor in 1561, in Dennington, Suffolk, England. He died on 28 October 1606, in Manchester, Lancashire, England, at the age of 61, and was buried in Aspull, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Claypool Goodale est né en 1545, à Manchester, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Robert Goodloe, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Lady Anna Elizabetha de Gerard, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Taylor en 1561, à Dennington, Suffolk, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 28 octobre 1606, à Manchester, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Aspull, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Claypool Goodale 1545 in Manchester, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Robert Goodloe 31 und seine Mutter Lady Anna Elizabetha de Gerard 24. Er hat 1561 in Dennington, Suffolk, England Elizabeth Taylor geheiratet. Er starb am 28. Oktober 1606 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Manchester, Lancashire, England und wurde in Aspull, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Claypool Goodale è nato il nel 1545 nel Manchester, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Robert Goodloe, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Lady Anna Elizabetha de Gerard, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Taylor nel 1561, nel Dennington, Suffolk, England. Morì il 28 ottobre 1606, nel Manchester, Lancashire, England, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Aspull, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Claypool Goodaleが1545年にイギリスランカシュアイアマンチェスターで生まれた時，父Thomas Robert Goodloeは31歳，母Lady Anna Elizabetha de Gerardは24歳であった。1561年にイギリススフォルクデニントンでElizabeth Taylorと結婚した。彼は1606年10月28日にイギリスランカシュアイアマンチェスターで61歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアアスプウルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Claypool Goodale(이)가 1545년 영국 랭카실르 먼체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Robert Goodloe(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Anna Elizabetha de Gerard(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1561년 영국 수폴크 데닝턴에서 Elizabeth Taylor(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1606년 10월 28일 영국 랭카실르 먼체스터에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 아스풀에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Claypool Goodale nasceu em 1545, em Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Robert Goodloe, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Lady Anna Elizabetha de Gerard, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Taylor em 1561, em Dennington, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 28 de outubro de 1606, em Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Aspull, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Claypool Goodale родился в 1545 г. в местности манчестир, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Robert Goodloe было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Anna Elizabetha de Gerard, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Taylor в 1561 г. в местности деннингтон, суффолк, Англия. Он умер 28 октября 1606 г. в местности манчестир, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности аспулл, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Claypool Goodale nació en 1545, en Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Robert Goodloe, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Lady Anna Elizabetha de Gerard, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Taylor en 1561, en Dennington, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Murió el 28 de octubre de 1606, en Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Aspull, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
